title: Stamina Mod
description: A mod that will complicate your game by adding stamina
body:
StaminaMod - A unique mod to add a feature to vanilla minecraft, with this mod you will no longer be able to run and jump endlessly, you will need to wait until the endurance strip is filled!
A survival complication mod, and its name is StaminaMod ![Full Stamina](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1806b123d6be027b159b1432120ab1cbfb007dcb.png)
